title: QUIC CRT client-side abbreviated resumption completion verification
verification_method: Focused requirement-home tests, runtime inspection, and regression evidence.
scope: Verify that an accepted PSK-capable ClientHello attempt advances through the abbreviated client-side resumption flight after ServerHello, that rejected attempts still fall back to the existing full-handshake path, that the accepted path does not require certificate or certificate-verify messages, and that early data remains explicitly closed.
preconditions: The repository builds successfully on net10.0.
REQ-QUIC-CRT-0127, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0128, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0129, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0130, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0131, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0132, and REQ-QUIC-CRT-0133 remain landed prerequisites.
The diagnostics/qlog family remains separately traced under REQ-QUIC-CRT-0134 through REQ-QUIC-CRT-0136.

supplemental_sections.heading: Acceptance Criteria
supplemental_sections.content:
- Accepted PSK attempts advance beyond ServerHello into the abbreviated `EncryptedExtensions -> Finished` flight and reach client-side handshake completion.
- Rejected PSK attempts still fall back cleanly to the existing full-handshake path.
- The accepted path does not require certificate or certificate-verify messages, and early data stays explicitly closed.
- The slice does not claim 0-RTT packet support, anti-replay, key update, or any public API widening.

status_summary: This verification artifact records the active abbreviated-completion slice and points at the requirement-home and runtime evidence that will prove accepted PSK attempts now complete the abbreviated resumption handshake while rejected attempts still fall back cleanly.
expected_result: The managed client/runtime path reaches abbreviated resumption completion after an accepted ServerHello, rejected attempts retain the full-handshake fallback path, and the repository does not widen its public promise.
procedure: Inspect the detached resumption carrier, client runtime bootstrap, key schedule, bridge driver, and transcript progression seams for an accepted PSK branch that advances past ServerHello without requiring certificate or certificate-verify messages.
Verify that the accepted branch uses the abbreviated `EncryptedExtensions -> Finished` transcript and that the runtime reaches peer transcript completion and Active state.
Verify that rejected attempts still route through the existing full-handshake path unchanged.
Verify that early data remains explicitly closed and that the non-resumption bootstrap path remains unchanged when no eligible dormant carrier is present.
Verify that the public surface still does not expose resumption or early-data promises.
Run the focused REQ_QUIC_CRT_0137 requirement-home tests, the current CRT/API/INT guard set, the full `REQ_QUIC_CRT_` sweep, and repo-local SpecTrace validation plus render checks.
